            global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterFactory<global::ExternalLib.ServiceClient>(Create);
        }

        private static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::ExternalLib.ServiceClient> Create(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior, object[] constructorArgs)

            var mock = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::ExternalLib.ServiceClient>(impl, engine);
            return mock;
        }
    }

        global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

        internal ExternalLib_ServiceClient_MockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::ExternalLib.ServiceClient> engine) : base()
        {
            _engine = engine;
        }

        public override string GetValue(string key)
        {
            if (_engine.TryHandleCallWithReturn<string>(0, "GetValue", new object?[] { key }, "", out var __result))
            {
                return __result;
            }
            return base.GetValue(key);
        }

        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
        {
            throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
        }
